description: At the beginning of the month, the AR department needs to send statements of account to all customers showing their previous balance, new invoices, payments, and ending balance.

nodes.task_description: For each customer, retrieve all invoice and payment activity for the prior month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all the necessary transaction data.

nodes.task_description: Generate a statement of account for each customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully produces the statement documents.

nodes.task_description: Email the statements to all customers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully completes the bulk email send.
